limitations: F4_leg_class stub mapping (top_horizontal_inlet→cooler, top_horizontal_exit→downcomer, bottom_horizontal_inlet→heater, bottom_horizontal_exit→upcomer) applied via runtime monkey-patch; stubs are ~25 mm each so contribution is negligible (<0.2 Pa each).
insulation matching from Jin temperature sweep (rad=1); ±0.05 in sensitivity not explored.
No minor losses (k_90deg=k_20deg=0.0) to match Jin gap baseline.
F4 upcomer correlation is valid only for 3 Re points (Salt 2/3/4 Jin); extrapolation below Salt 2 Re is speculative.
f4_stub_patch_rationale: AGENT-191 hardened solver.py to raise ValueError for unmapped segments. solver.py is READ-ONLY per BOARD.md; stubs patched at runtime in the comparison script.
